title: athlete-guardian — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by AthleteGuardianServiceProvider::boot(). Used by both observer + FormRequest data classes.

rules.name: valid_guardian_relationship
rules.description: Enforces the relationship enum. Refuses any value outside: mother / father / step_mother / step_father / grandmother / grandfather / aunt / uncle / sibling / legal_guardian / foster_parent / other.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid guardian relationship.

rules.name: valid_guardian_role_flags
rules.description: Cross-field validation: refuses can_authorise_medical_care=true when has_legal_custody=false. Medical authorisation requires legal custody.
rules.default_message: Medical care authorisation requires legal custody.

rules.name: one_primary_guardian_per_athlete
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index (tenant_id, athlete_id, is_primary=true, deleted_at IS NULL). Exactly one primary per athlete when any guardian exists.
rules.default_message: This athlete already has an active primary guardian. Demote the existing primary first, or use /set-primary for the atomic swap.

rules.name: guardian_user_active
rules.description: Refuses when the referenced User is soft-deleted or not active in this tenant.
rules.default_message: The referenced user is not active in this tenant.

rules.name: guardian_athlete_active
rules.description: Refuses when the referenced Athlete is withdrawn or archived. Cannot add guardian to a non-active athlete.
rules.default_message: The athlete is withdrawn or archived; guardianship cannot be established.

rules.name: no_duplicate_guardian_per_athlete_user
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index (tenant_id, athlete_id, user_id, deleted_at IS NULL). One live row per (athlete, guardian_user).
rules.default_message: This user is already a guardian for this athlete.
